product.name: Persilux Custom Size Cordless Zebra Blinds for Windows Free-Stop Roller Windows Shades Dual Layer Light Control for Day and Night, Light Filtering Sheer Shades for Home and Bedroom Grey
features: 【Excellent Material】Made of imported 100% Polyester. Light filtering, good ventilation, anti-static, dust-proof and durable. Dual-layer fabric for daylight filtering and full night privacy.

【ORDER CONFIRMATION】We provide plenty of choices to fit your window sizes. Click "Customize Now" on the upper right to find more. Order the closest size and then we will send email within 24 hours to confirm window information,if we do not get any reply in 48 hours, we will make the size without any adjustment. If you are not sure about size and color, please order one blind to test, depending on the weight and distance, a return can be costly.

【Upgrade High-Quality Accessories】Cordless shades are certified Best for Kids, making them safe for children as well as pets. Our blind has been upgraded to have a sturdier bottom rail to prevent the fabric from fraying, which makes the two layers of fabrics more closely fit, maximizing the effect of shading. An anti-collision strip installed under the rail for protecting your window frame.

【How to choose a correct size to fit? Example your window meas 23" width x less than 72" Height.】INSIDE MOUNT: Window Width is Blind width. Blind Width=23"; Blind Height=72". OUTSIDE MOUNT: Plus at least 4" is blind width, Blind Width=23"+4"=27"; Blind Height=72".【Pls Note】Fabric width will be 0.8" narrower than the size of the blind.

【Quality service】It takes about 17 days from making the shades to reaching the customer. The package includes an blind, an installation guide, several installation hardwares. Easy to clean, you just need to moisten the cloth and gently wipe the surface of the fabric. Pls feel free to MSG us if there are missing or broken accessories.
